## How it was tested

<!-- LapDeck's OS-glue has no test suite; honest manual testing is the bar.
     Say what you exercised — ideally from a real phone on the same Wi-Fi. -->

- [ ] Ran the agent (`npm start`) and exercised the changed area from a phone/browser
- [ ] No control logic added to the client (phone only sends protocol messages)
- [ ] Windows-specific code stays in `src/win/`
- [ ] Protocol changes (if any) documented in `docs/PROTOCOL.md`; settings changes in `docs/CONFIGURATION.md`
